message:
test(fsqlite-pager): add PageBuf pool and PageCache IO safety tests

PageBuf tests:
- Validate Send + 'static bounds on PageBuf
- Verify page alignment meets OS constraints
- Test buffer recycling via pool drop-and-reclaim
- Test capacity enforcement (pool bounded allocation)
- Test size isolation (keyed-by-page-size pooling)

PageCache tests:
- Test spawn_blocking_io read page semantics
- Validate no-unsafe-in-blocking-io constraint
- Test cancellation mid-IO returns buffer to pool
- Test pager reads pages via pool integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
